summary: Cognitive Migration Phase (Iteration 29) VERIFIED: All 35 backend tests passed. RBAC gates verified (super_admin on admin routes). All 18 prompts wired to Supabase system_prompts table. server.py at 1,839 lines. 15 route modules + AI Core fully operational. Frontend landing and login pages load correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: RBAC gates correctly implemented: get_super_admin for /api/admin/*, get_client_admin available for profile routes
prompt_registry.py correctly fetches from Supabase system_prompts table with in-memory caching
All extracted routes use Depends(get_current_user) for auth enforcement
core/ai_core.py get_system_prompt() now async, uses get_prompt() for constitution, myadvisor, myintel, chief_strategy
routes/calibration.py uses get_prompt() for watchtower_brain, voice_response, activation
routes/email.py uses get_prompt() for email_priority, email_reply
routes/profile.py uses get_prompt() for autofill, build, elite_mentor, oac
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cognitive Migration Phase complete. All 18 AI prompts wired to Supabase system_prompts table via prompt_registry.py. RBAC gates: super_admin on admin routes (/api/admin/*), client_admin available for profile management. Key prompt keys: biqc_constitution_v1, myadvisor_general_v1, myadvisor_proactive_v1, myintel_signal_v1, chief_strategy_base_v1, mysoundboard_v1, watchtower_brain_v1, voice_response_v1, activation_v1, email_priority_v1, email_reply_v1, profile_autofill_v1, profile_build_v1, elite_mentor_v1, oac_recommendations_v1.
